project: Project Name - Project Version - (c) wild haired science
Copy data in to begin, then click update.
Click to select a series or point
You can copy in a selected series' labels as a column, one per row.
Select Series to edit name and dot style.

▪ x as the variable
  ▪ + - * / ^ ()
  ▪ sqrt()
  ▪ log(), ln() 
  ▪ sin(), asin() etc. 
ex: 2x^2 + 3*x + sqrt(5)
One function per line. NOT case sensative
